things.name: Brimstone Hill Fortress (UNESCO)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 18th-century British fortress called the Gibraltar of the West Indies

things.name: St Kitts Scenic Railway
things.description: The last working railway in the Caribbean - a narrow-gauge loop built for sugar cane

things.name: Nevis Island Day Trip
things.description: Sister island with Alexander Hamilton's birthplace, plantation hotels and black sand beaches

things.name: Black Rocks Volcanic Coast
things.description: Dramatic lava formations where a volcano pushed into the Atlantic Ocean

things.name: Independence Square, Basseterre
things.description: The historic heart of Basseterre with Georgian colonial architecture

things.name: Frigate Bay Beaches
things.description: Atlantic and Caribbean beaches separated by a narrow isthmus - the strip of beach bars

things.name: Mount Liamuiga Volcano Hike
things.description: Hike the dormant volcano to a rainforest-lined crater at 1,156m

things.name: Timothy Hill Lookout
things.description: Best viewpoint to see both the Atlantic Ocean and Caribbean Sea simultaneously

things.name: National Museum of St Kitts
things.description: In the historic treasury building - the story of Amerindian and colonial St Kitts

things.name: Goat Water (National Dish)
things.description: Saint Kitts national dish - a hearty stew of goat meat, breadfruit and spices
